hub.newSheetDesc: Create a technical formulation from scratch.
hub.wizardDesc: Generate from photo or raw text.
hub.presetsDesc: Create a base sheet ready to edit.

wizard.title: AI Assistant
wizard.subtitle: Describe your recipe or send a photo
wizard.label: Describe the Recipe
wizard.placeholder: Ex: Carrot cake with chocolate topping. Ingredients: 3 carrots, 3 eggs...
wizard.dropText: Click to upload a photo of a notebook or menu
wizard.errorSafety: The content was blocked by AI safety filters.
wizard.errorDefault: Error processing with AI. Check your API key or try again.

editor.title: Technical Editor
editor.subtitle: Define the industrial formulation parameters.
editor.emptyHint: * Leave blank if you do not want to show in the final file.
editor.illustrationHint: Generate a minimalist drawing based on the formula and ingredients.
editor.illustrationEmpty: Fill the name or ingredients to generate.

placeholders.observations: Quality notes, shelf life, oven temperature...
placeholders.quotationNotes: Scope, timing, deliverables, exclusions and commercial terms...

preview.draftBadge: Draft preview. Mark as FINAL to export.

validation.totalWeightZero: Total weight is zero with filled ingredients.
validation.unitSolid: Unit may be KG/GR for solids.
validation.unitLiquid: Unit may be LT/ML for liquids.
validation.ingredientQtyRequired: Ingredient {index}: quantity must be greater than zero.

messages.draftExportBlock: This sheet is DRAFT. Mark as FINAL to export.
messages.draftPdfBlock: This sheet is DRAFT. Mark as FINAL to export PDF.
messages.exportToolsMissing: Could not open the export window.
messages.invalidJson: Invalid JSON. Check the structure and try again.
messages.jsonImportHelp: Paste the JSON in the required format. Optional fields will be preserved.

presets.title: Presets
presets.chimichurriDesc: Dry structure with herbs and spices.

formulas.emptyDesc: Start by creating your first technical sheet.

import.dropOrClick: Drop file here or click to select
import.parseError: Could not parse the file. Check the structure and try again.
import.advancedHint: Advanced mode active — edit code directly.

printable.title: TECHNICAL FORMULATION
printable.subtitle: Standardized Production Control
printable.footer: Document generated electronically for internal use

settings.title: Settings
settings.helpModeDesc: Shows or hides the hint buttons (?) throughout the system. Disable for a cleaner interface.
settings.advancedDesc: Reveals technical fields and statistics for experienced formulators: formulation phases (A–E), INCI names, batch size, pH range, viscosity profile, and formula version.
settings.advancedActive: Advanced mode active — technical fields and formulation phases visible in the editor.

quotations.comingSoonDesc: The quotations module is under development and will be launched soon.
quotations.emptyDesc: Create your first quotation for rendered services.
quotations.wizardPlaceholder: Describe the service, formulas and payment conditions in free text...

hints.newFormula: Creates a new blank technical sheet. All fields will be available to fill in.
hints.wizard: The AI Assistant automatically generates a complete technical sheet from a recipe photo, notebook, or text description.
hints.import: Import saved sheets in XML format (export backup) or JSON (data structure).
hints.presets: Pre-configured templates with base structure. Useful for starting common category sheets faster.
hints.filterStatus: Filter sheets by status. 'All' shows everything, 'Final' shows only approved sheets, 'Draft' shows those still being edited.
hints.finalize: Validates the sheet and marks it as Final, enabling PDF and XML export. Draft sheets cannot be exported.
hints.focusMode: Hides the toolbar to maximize editing space and minimize distractions.
hints.exportPdf: Opens the print dialog to save as PDF. Only available for sheets with Final status.
hints.exportXml: Exports the sheet in XML format for backup or future reimport.
hints.statusBadge: Indicates the sheet's current state. Draft: sheet in editing, export blocked. Final: approved for production, export available as PDF and XML.
hints.recentActivity: Lists the latest technical sheets created or edited. Click any item to open the full preview.
hints.advancedMode: Unlocks technical fields in the formula editor: phases (A=Aqueous, B=Oil, C=Emulsifier, D=Active, E=Fragrance), INCI name per ingredient, batch size with auto-scaling, pH target range with visual indicator, viscosity profile, and formula version. Also shows a code editor in import modals.
hints.primaryColor: The accent color applied to buttons, icons and interactive elements throughout the system.
hints.template: Reference structure of the format accepted by the system. Use as a guide when creating your import file manually.
hints.metrics: Summary of registered technical sheets. Click any card to access the corresponding module.
hints.company: Company data displayed in exported technical sheets. Leave blank to omit.
hints.newQuotation: Creates a new quotation. Enter services, linked formulas, amounts and payment terms.
hints.quotationAI: The AI Assistant interprets a text or image description and automatically generates a structured quotation.
hints.quotationLink: Link formulas from the system to this quotation. When finalized, they can be exported together.
hints.ingredients: Add the formula ingredients. Use % for concentrations, GR/KG for solids, ML/LT for liquids. Unit cost is optional and automatically calculates the total estimated cost.
